title: lastrea elongata
intro: Lastrea elongata, also known as the Elongated Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lastrea elongata include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
